title: Set 15: Helping at a Café ☕

conversation.speaker: Manager
conversation.text: Thanks for helping me in the café today, Richard.

conversation.speaker: Manager
conversation.text: Could you please clean the tables in the garden?

conversation.speaker: Manager
conversation.text: What would that customer at table four like to eat?

conversation.speaker: Manager
conversation.text: How much does a large bottle of lemonade cost?

conversation.speaker: Manager
conversation.text: Would you mind bringing these spoons to the kitchen?

conversation.speaker: Manager
conversation.text: You’ve worked very hard. Would you like a piece of cake?

options.text: It’s three pounds and fifty pence.
I’d love one, thank you very much!
You’re welcome. I’m happy to be here.
Just a sandwich and a small salad.
I'm going to have a cup of tea.
Not at all. I’ll take them right now.
Certainly. I’ll get a cloth and some water.
No, I haven't seen them today.

explanations_vi: Quản lý nhờ lau bàn ngoài vườn (clean the tables), Richard đáp Chắc chắn rồi. Cháu sẽ đi lấy giẻ và nước (Certainly. I'll get a cloth and some water).
Quản lý hỏi khách ở bàn số 4 muốn ăn gì (like to eat), Richard trả lời Chỉ một chiếc bánh mì kẹp và một đĩa salad nhỏ (Just a sandwich and a small salad).
Quản lý hỏi chai nước chanh lớn giá bao nhiêu (How much does... cost), Richard đáp Giá của nó là 3 bảng 50 xu (It's three pounds and fifty pence).
Quản lý nhờ mang thìa vào bếp (Would you mind bringing...), Richard bảo Không phiền đâu. Cháu sẽ mang vào ngay (Not at all. I'll take them right now).
Quản lý khen Richard làm việc chăm chỉ và mời ăn bánh (Would you like a piece of cake), Richard vui vẻ đáp Cháu rất muốn, cảm ơn chú rất nhiều! (I'd love one, thank you very much!).
